untranslatable_reason: Signal requires real-time news sentiment data and price divergence detection from external news feeds. The allowed indicator set contains only technical price/volume metrics and does not include news sentiment scores, sentiment divergence measures, or external data feeds. The core logic ('price moves opposite to news direction') cannot be expressed using only OHLCV and standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally incompatible with a pure technical backtest engine. It requires: (1) external news sentiment data source, (2) sentiment polarity scoring mechanism, (3) divergence detection between price and sentiment vectors. To implement this signal, the backtester would need to be extended with a news sentiment data module and custom composite indicators measuring price-sentiment divergence. As written, it cannot be translated into the allowed indicator and operator set.
